seoTitle: Call QuickBooks Support and Get Contact Numbers
metaDescription: How to reach live QuickBooks support through the in-app Help console, request a callback, or find Intuit's official phone number.
intro: Getting stuck on a technical issue doesn't have to mean sitting through a frustrating phone tree. QuickBooks Online's built-in Help console can route you to a live callback, a chat agent, or give you the official Intuit support number directly. This guide covers all three paths.

steps.heading: Open the Help panel
steps.body: Click the question mark Help icon in the top right of your workspace.

steps.heading: Request a callback
steps.body: In the assistant field, type Talk to a Human, follow the guided prompts to select your issue category, then click Contact Us.

steps.heading: Schedule the callback
steps.body: Review the estimated wait time and click Get a Callback to have an agent call your mobile line.

steps.heading: Try live chat instead
steps.body: Alternatively, click Start a Chat to connect with a live technical representative through text.

steps.heading: Find the direct dial number
steps.body: For a direct call, the official Intuit support line is 1-800-4INTUIT (1-800-446-8848), with extended hours for higher support tiers.

faq.question: Is there a way to skip the automated assistant entirely?
faq.answer: Typing Talk to a Human into the assistant field is the fastest way to route past automated prompts toward live support options.

faq.question: Does the callback option work from mobile too?
faq.answer: Yes, the Help matrix is also accessible through the QuickBooks mobile app if you need to request a callback on the go.

faq.question: Are support hours the same for every subscription tier?
faq.answer: No, higher tiers like Gold and Platinum ProAdvisor accounts typically get extended weekend support hours.

faq.question: What if I'm locked out of my account and can't log in?
faq.answer: The public Intuit Help portal outside the app has options specifically for account recovery assistance.
